title: mentha × platyphylla
intro: Mentha × platyphylla, also known as peppermint x ginger mint, is a hybrid plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is a cross between peppermint (Mentha piperita) and ginger mint (Mentha × gracilis). The mentha × platyphylla plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of mentha × platyphylla include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, and it has also been used to alleviate headaches and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of mentha × platyphylla include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
